title: bupleurum fruticescens var. balansae
intro: Bupleurum fruticescens var. balansae, also known as Bupleurum chinense or Chai Hu, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum fruticescens var. balansae include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
